paper_focus.title: Research on the microstructure and corrosion behaviour of Fe–Mn–Al–C low-density steel alloyed with Cu
paper_focus.research_objective: To investigate the effect of Cu content on the microstructure and corrosion behavior of Fe–30Mn–8Al–1C austenite-based low-density steel in a chloride environment.
main_process_variables: cooling: air cooling to room temperature
corrosion test medium: 3.5 wt% NaCl solution
expected_information_axis: microstructure (austenite grain size, carbide distribution, Cu segregation)
